page.title: Plugg
page.intro: Welcome to Plugg! This is where we gather course material, past exams, and helpful resources so it is easier to find your way through every year at LTH. Whether you are just getting started or close to graduation, we hope this page feels like a friendly shortcut when studies get intense.
page.search_placeholder: Search programmes, years, courses, and specialisations...
page.search_hint: Start typing to find matches across all Plugg content, not only the programme list.
page.contact_card_text: We want Plugg to stay a living, reliable hub for everyone at the section. If you notice errors, broken links, outdated documents, or material that should be here, we would really appreciate hearing from you.
page.contact_card_note: If possible, include the course code, programme or year, and a short note about what should be updated so we can fix it faster.
page.section_programs_text: Use the top row in the navbar to switch between programmes and reveal each programme year.
page.section_courses_text: Each programme year has its own course dropdown. Pick a course to jump directly to relevant material.
page.section_specialisations_text: Specialisations are grouped per programme in separate dropdowns for fast access.
page.advertisement_title: Do you like design or code?
page.advertisement_text: Do you think you could improve this page or help with new features for the web, server or app? Apply to become a webmaster next fall semester!

contact_reminder.title: Found something missing or outdated?
contact_reminder.text: Help us keep this page accurate. Share corrections, upload new documents, or give us tips by emailing plugg@fsektionen.se (or click this box).
